mapper.select: select orderid, prog_job_nm, bgnn_chng_dvcd, param_base_dt, db, update_query, insert_query, created_at, error_message from cotdl.tbl_progorderhist order by orderid desc

SELECT h.orderid, h.prog_job_nm, h.bgnn_chng_dvcd, h.param_base_dt, h.db, h.update_query, h.insert_query, h.created_at, h.error_message, o.status from cotdl.tbl_progorderhist as h join cotdl.tbl_piiorder as o on o.orderid = h.orderid where o.status = 'Ended OK' order by orderid desc;
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cotdl.tbl_progorderhist (orderid, prog_job_nm, bgnn_chng_dvcd, param_base_dt, db, update_query, insert_query, error_message) values (#{orderid}, #{prog_job_nm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bgnn_chng_dvcd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{param_base_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{update_query, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{insert_query, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{error_message, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

INSERT INTO cotdl.tbl_progorderhist (orderid, prog_job_nm, bgnn_chng_dvcd, param_base_dt, db, update_query, insert_query, error_message) values (#{orderid}, #{prog_job_nm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bgnn_chng_dvcd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{param_base_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{update_query, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{insert_query, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{error_message, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_progorderhist set error_message= #{error_message, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, where orderid= #{orderid}
mapper.select:
select orderid, prog_job_nm, bgnn_chng_dvcd, param_base_dt, db, update_query, insert_query, created_at, error_message from cotdl.tbl_progorderhist
order by orderid desc limit #{offset}, #{amount}
